title: Discocoffea lasiodelphys
taxonomy: Discocoffea lasiodelphys is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to Madagascar. As a member of the Rubiaceae family, Discocoffea lasiodelphys is closely related to other plants like Gardenia and Cephalanthus. However, further classification may involve its position within the tribe or genus. Further research is needed to determine its full classification.
